module.name: native
module.purpose: Defines folder-organized native Tool implementations with static ToolPreview metadata, common config Platform support values, ToolRuntime status streaming, cancellation handling normalized through shared ToolExecutionResult helper results, Windows-only tools where required, and aggregate native preview lists for registry advertising after platform filtering.

childModules.name: file
childModules.purpose: File-system native tools for reading, writing, listing, and searching local files with cross-platform support and ToolRuntime status/cancellation behavior.

childModules.name: image
childModules.purpose: Image native tools for inspecting metadata and writing transformed local images with cross-platform support and JSON ToolRuntime results.

childModules.name: network
childModules.purpose: Network native tools for HTTP requests and DNS lookup with cross-platform Platform support and ToolRuntime status/cancellation behavior.

childModules.name: package
childModules.purpose: Windows package query native tool that runs PowerShell Get-Package and streams package metadata JSON.

childModules.name: shell
childModules.purpose: Shell native command execution tool with cross-platform shell selection, streaming stdout/stderr, timeout, cancellation, and ToolRuntime statuses.

childModules.name: system
childModules.purpose: System, process, and environment native tools that report OS details, environment variables, and Windows tasklist process JSON with Platform support markers.
